posts.author: mayank_ambastha
posts.text: NVIDIA alone is now bigger than the entire Indian stock market. What are we missing? — Few days back there were so much of discussions on Taiwan overtaking India in terms of market cap and now this. The talent was never the problem but the ecosystem always has been. I think Taiwan is a better comparison and example for India than US, given the massive infra and capital gap with US. TSMC happened because of a deliberate bet on infrastructure by the govt. and an ecosystem that gave talent a reason to stay. India needs the same thinking for AI. Also Can India create its own NVIDIA? might be the w…

posts.author: BB789
posts.text: NVIDIA alone is now bigger than the entire Indian stock market. What are we missing? — To me, it boils down to ease of doing business. If government fixes that, we may have innovation automatically just because of the number of ideas that will go farther than what it will do now. Today however, most likely, any new idea will die or go overseas.

posts.author: AGASTHYA_36
posts.text: NVIDIA alone is now bigger than the entire Indian stock market. What are we missing? — Just came across something shocking. NVIDIA market cap ≈ $5T India’s total listed market cap ≈ $4.97T A single US company is now worth more than all Indian listed companies combined. But honestly, the bigger point is not valuation. Many engineers working at NVIDIA are Indians and not necessarily only from IITs/NITs. A lot of talented people from normal colleges are contributing to world-class innovation outside India. Makes me wonder: Is infrastructure the real differentiator? Does good work culture + resear…
